title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates
company: Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates!
